RULING: PLAINTIFFS' NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ORDER MAINTAINING THE CURRENT TRIAL DATE WITH PREFERENCE
Hearing held, argued and tentative ruling modified as follows: Plaintiff's motion to maintain the trial date with preference is granted pursuant to C.C.P. 36(e). The initial trial date of April 15, 2019 is vacated and the new trial date is July 8, 2019 at 11:15 a.m. in Department 503. Last day pursuant to C.C.P. 36(f) is July 17, 2019. Last day for hearing on Defendant Union Carbide Corporation's Motion for Summary Judgment is July 5, 2019. Fact discovery cut-off date is July 5, 2019. Expert discovery cut-off date is on day of trial, July 8, 2019. Further case management conference on May 15, 2019 at 1:30 p.m. Plaintiffs to make a settlement demand on defendants no later than May 24, 2019. Responses to the demand are due no later than June 7, 2019. The parties are ordered to provide confidential settlement demands/offers stating their best and final settlement effort. This confidential value must be separately submitted to Commissioner Pang Ly via electronic mail by June 28, 2019 at 12:00 p.m. Mandatory settlement conference with only the attorneys present and final decision makers available by phone is set for Tuesday, July 2, 2019 at 9:30 a.m. in 603. Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Reporter: Kimberly L. Avery of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #5074 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/CML)
